chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5906 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 19.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Idrees Alvi, Advocate for the petitioner SI Aslam, PS Shahra-e-Noor Jahan, Karachi Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Abdul Jalil A. Zubedi, AAG ---------------------- I.O files report alongwith set of documents, taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that missing person has been surfaced, therefore, under instructions he does not press instant petition. Learned Assistant Attorney General as well as learned AAG present in Court in some other cases have no objection. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
